description: Evaluation rubric for DealSniper listing analysis qualification

dimensions.name: Deal assessment accuracy
dimensions.description: Correctly identifies whether a listing is a good deal based on price, condition, and market context.

dimensions.name: Reasoning quality
dimensions.description: Analysis provides specific, logical reasoning for the deal assessment.

dimensions.name: Risk identification
dimensions.description: Identifies relevant risks such as shipping costs, seller reputation, item condition concerns.

dimensions.name: Actionability
dimensions.description: Negotiation tips are specific and actionable, not generic advice.

dimensions.name: Output-schema compliance
dimensions.description: Output is valid JSON matching the output schema.

failConditions: claiming a deal is good without supporting evidence
